name: Through the Clouds — annual HV change detection
description: Borneo PALSAR-2 L-band HV two-date deforestation alerts (BUILD_CONTRACT §3.4-3.10; ADR-0001 classical, ADR-0003 no DN->dB calibration). Automatable via run_recipe(id='ttc_detect_change', zone=...). The detect step execs /app/ttc-config/detect.py, a byte-faithful port of the proven src/ pipeline (validated: 54 alerts / UA 0.401 PA 0.301 F1 0.344). The vendor run_recipe only substitutes $zone, so inputs/thresholds are baked in and outputs go to /data/outputs/recipe_run/.

zone.description: Geocodable canvas study zone (cosmetic; detection is file-driven).

steps.description: Define the canvas study zone over Central Kalimantan.
Load the baseline-year PALSAR HV mosaic.
Load the comparison-year PALSAR HV mosaic.
Despeckle (Lee 7x7) -> delta HV -> water/non-forest masks -> -2.5 dB threshold -> morphology -> MMU -> polygonize -> per-polygon attrs + Hansen cross-reference.
Load the alert polygons for canvas/screenshot/export.

outputs: /data/outputs/recipe_run/alerts_2023.geojson — FeatureCollection (EPSG:4326), props: n_px, area_ha, mean_delta_hv_db, min_delta_hv_db, baseline_hv_db, candidate_plantation_frontier, hansen_gfc_2023
